mapper.select:
SELECT m.*, u.nickname as create_user_name FROM meme m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.create_user_id = u.id WHERE m.deleted = 0
AND m.status = #{status}
AND (m.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM meme_tag mt WHERE mt.meme_id = m.id AND mt.tag_id = #{tagId} )
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
